---
title: "Sarah Matilda Palmer"
---

## Sarah Matilda Palmer

**Dates:** (1841-1874)

**Maiden name:** (Ashwell)

### Description

Melanesian missionary

### Biography

She married (1868) her first cousin the Rev. [[person:1884]John Palmer].

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 31st  [1870]
- Letter from November 24, 1869.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
